name: John Ondrush Golf & Fitness Academy
about: John Ondrush Golf & Fitness Academy is a state-of-the-art indoor facility located in Syosset, New York, designed to integrate golf instruction with physical fitness. The venue features 18-hole golf course simulation stations, a full gym specific to golf training, a driving range, putting green, and short-game area. The facility utilizes advanced technology including launch monitors and video analysis to provide comprehensive swing and 3D analysis. The academy is staffed by PGA Professionals and focuses on personalized programs tailored to enhance skills and address physical limitations affecting a player's game. It operates as a serious training environment, offering memberships that bundle simulator time with personal training sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Integration of golf-specific fitness and instruction
State-of-the-art technology including Trackman and 3D swing analysis
Access to PGA Professionals for lessons
Full gym and training facilities on-site
amenities_list: golf-specific gym|driving range|putting green|short-game area|club fitting|personal training|locker rooms|wifi

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club fitting services and may have rental options available for your session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: As a professional training academy, food and drink policies are not explicitly detailed, but the focus is on fitness and instruction.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the pace of play and the software used.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the academy offers programs for all skill levels and ages, including juniors, in a professional and instructional environment.
